findings.claim: SC-01 resolution_status: 'unresolved' — MAESTRO's third demonstrator targets logistics and supply chain planning rather than in-vehicle autonomous driving, leaving the portfolio coverage conflict with CC-10/SR-07 explicitly unresolved in the concept refinement summary.
findings.violated_rule: CLAUDE.md §7 Phase 2 gate — 'No unresolved scope conflicts remain between the concept and Tier 2B.'

findings.claim: SC-02 resolution_status: 'unresolved' — The mandatory Tier 2B scope requirement SR-04 ('Integration of external tools and APIs is an essential required element') is not explicitly addressed as a named architecture component or research pillar in the MAESTRO concept, and this conflict is logged as unresolved in the concept refinement summary.
findings.violated_rule: CLAUDE.md §7 Phase 2 gate — 'No unresolved scope conflicts remain between the concept and Tier 2B.'

failed.fail_message: Phase 2 gate condition is not satisfied: the concept refinement summary records two explicitly unresolved scope conflicts (SC-01: logistics sector vs. in-vehicle autonomous driving portfolio coverage; SC-02: missing explicit SR-04 tool and API integration mechanism), both of which must be resolved before the Phase 2 gate can pass per CLAUDE.md §7.
